sentences.translation: Hasan je posjetio stari historijski grad.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan visited an old historical city.

sentences.translation: Vidio je tvrđave i stare džamije.
sentences.translationEn: He saw old castles and mosques.
He took many photos with his phone.

sentences.arabic: أَرْسَلَ الصُّوَرَ إِلَى عَائِلَتِهِ وَهُمْ فَرِحُوا.
sentences.translation: Poslao je fotografije svojoj porodici i oni su se obradovali.
sentences.translationEn: He sent the photos to his family and they were happy.
